reviews.review_description: ITS SO HARD IT MAKES NOO SENCE AND I CAN NEVER HIT THE ROBOTS IN TIME THERES NO STORY THERS NO POINT. ALL YOU HAVE TO DO IS KILL THESE DEFECTIVE ROBOTS THAT WERE MADE TO HELP PEOPLE BUT THEN THEY TURNED ON US AND NOW YOU HAVE TO FIGHT THEM...

reviews.review_title: This could be my favorite vr game
reviews.review_description: I am a huge fan of the idea. I have always loved swords and getting to use them in vr is my absolute favorite. However there’s a few things I didn’t quite like. 1. The angle of the swords are a bit too high. It felt like I had to bend my wrist down a little to get the right angle. Even with the angle I didn’t like this was still the best vr sword experience I have found personally. Still I had a lot of fun. 2. The game is nothing like what the pictures and video described. I enjoy the basic training modes enough but if there was more like maybe a story or pvp battles it would make the experience that much more fun. If/when the full game comes out I will definitely be ready for it. Please keep working on this, I can’t wait to see how it turns out!

Thank you for checking out Super Sword! 
If you have feedback or want to chat with us devs, feel free to join our discord: 
https://discord.gg/E3Pm8QHeRs

Thanks again, and hope you enjoy the game!

I love melee combat in vr but I can't enjoy this for longer than 5 mins it's a bit too basic needs more layers I mean you have the core gameplay and I think you have the potential for a good game but you just might need to add stuff like faster droids or more enemies if you worked on this a little bit it could become a great game

Ps: game Devs if you see this maybe try not releasing a game every month but really spend a good time on one game and make one that you will be proud of as one month is too short of a time to make a game and I think that you can really make a great game just give it time and don't make a short one

developer_response.body:
Hello!
Thank you for a honest review, we always appreciate that!
We release a new game every month exactly because we want to make great games. Noone here expects that game is done after one month of work. But a month is enough to figure out core gameplay and see if the idea is fun. 
We are doing it so we can get feedback very early and work only on games that spark interest.
That is also why trying the game is completely for free.

That's exactly what is happening with SuperSword.
We are working on bunch of updates and improvements to make the game better. New mod with much faster pacing will be released very soon, within next few weeks!
Once again, thank you for feedback and if you would like to follow more stuff we do, check out our discord please!
Fansi

reviews.review_description: Seems great but some things can be added to make it a 5-star. Movement, sandbox, more enemies, ect.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review!
We want the game to be accessible to everyone so we decided to stay away from locomotion for SuperSword. 
I would love to hear your ideas about the sandbox! Joining Discord is the best way to let us know what to improve about the game.
Fansi

https://discord.gg/E3Pm8QHeRs

reviews.review_title: Needs a story mode based on the pictures
reviews.review_description: The training modes aren't exiting enough to keep me on this game.  but it has potential!
It is really fun and stuff but I can't get out of the training area, I don't know if its a bug or the images and video are false adverticement.
Too simple. Just stand there and slash stuff. Terrible graphics. Played for 2 minutes and got bored.

developer_response.body:
Hello! 

Thanks for trying the game, we are sorry to hear you didn't like it. Super Sword is a game that we developed over the course of a month, where the core gameplay indeed is to "stand there and slash stuff!"

We of course understand that this game is not for everyone.
The gameplay is focused on slashing droids, get your heart pumping and do some cardio, and stay alive long enough to get your name on the leaderboard! :) 

Once again, thanks for trying it out, even if it turned out to not be what you're looking for!
